title: CobbleTCG
description: A trading card collection mod for Cobblemon inspired by classic Pokémon TCG collections.
body:
# 🃏 CobbleTCG — Card Collecting for Cobblemon

![Prismatic Evolutions](https://i.imgur.com/O8p3rl0.png)

I created this mod because Pokémon has been a meaningful part of my life ever since I first played it on my Game Boy in 1999. After many years away from the franchise, discovering the amazing Cobblemon project — and especially the work of the Cobbleverse team — reignited my passion for this world.

The last time I played Pokémon was back in 2004, with Pokémon Ruby on my Game Boy Advance SP. Coming back and seeing that there are now over 1000 Pokémon, along with the passion and dedication that modders are putting into this universe, inspired me to contribute my own small part.

This mod was born not only as a personal challenge, but also as a gift for my girlfriend, who loves Pokémon and card collecting. I decided to make it public to share this idea: a combination of Cobbleverse and the joy of trading card collecting.

### 28 collections of approximately 5700 cards

![Collections](https://i.imgur.com/4aKQJnf.png)


## 🎴 Features

- Collect high-resolution Pokémon cards (original artwork from Pokémon TCG, unmodified)
 
- Enjoy collecting without spending real money, in a world where TCG has become increasingly expensive


![Albums](https://i.imgur.com/z6vUcVH.png)

## 📦 Card System

- 5700+ cards available (from common to secret rares)
- Booster packs with different probabilities:
- Normal packs
- Semi-God Packs
- God Packs
- Japanese-style format: 5 cards per pack (inventory-friendly)


![Album](https://i.imgur.com/KOsaSpU.png)

## 📚 Storage & Decoration

- Card Album:
  
    Store all your cards in one place
    Break and carry it with you
    Keeps all stored cards when placed again
  
- Bundle Block:
  
    Can be placed as decoration in the world

## 🔧 Crafting System

- Craft 1 Bundle using 6 booster packs
  
- Convert 1 Bundle → 6 booster packs using a crafting table

## 🏗️ Custom Structure

- A new structure featuring:
  
- 🏧 ATM Block
     Obtain coins to purchase bundles
  
- 🛒 Vendor
     Buy bundles
     Restocks every 60 minutes
  
- 🧑‍💼 Card Collector
  
     Offers new cards every 20 minutes
  
 ## 🏆 Custom Advancements
 
- Includes a custom achievement system
- Fun and thematic messages while progressing

### All card collections (1.5.0)

- 1999 Base Set  -  #102Cards
- 2000 Team Rocket  -  #83Cards
- 2000 Gym Challange  -  #132Cards

- 2022 Sword & Shield-Brillant Stars  -  #216Cards
- 2022 Sword & Shield-Astral Radiance  -  #246Cards
- 2022 Sword & Shield-Lost Origin  -  #247Cards
- 2022 Sword & Shield-Silver Tempest  -  #245Cards
- 2023 Sword & Shield-Crown Zenith  -  #230Cards
- 2023 Scarlet & Violet-Paldea Evolved  -  #280Cards

- 2024 Scarlet & Violet Paradox Rift - #268Cards

- 2026 Mega Evolution-Ascended Heroes  -  #296Cards



# [Discord](https://discord.gg/CsrgZjFbWF)

## Warning missing textures

As of version 1.4.0, this mod includes a total of 4 resource packs containing the textures for both cards and booster packs.

If the textures do not download automatically, you must search for CobbleTCG-ResourcePack# on the platform and install it manually.

If you have the resource packs installed, they should ideally enable themselves by default; however, in certain cases, they may require manual activation.

## Configuration and Commands
The mod features a small configuration file located at config/cobbletcg.properties.
Within this file, you can adjust:

- Booster pack prices
- Restock times
- The Welcome Pack
(Enable or disable the starter pack given to players after 1 hour of playtime on the server.)

You can edit this file while the game is running and apply changes instantly using the command: **_/cobbletcg reload_**

## **Downgrading Warning:**
If for any reason you need to revert to a version lower than 1.2.0, it is extremely important that you remove all cards from your albums first!

Steps to downgrade safely:

1-Remove all cards from your albums.

2-Store the cards in standard chests.

3-Install the older version.

4-Open your world and you can then safely place the cards back into the albums.



![Store](https://i.imgur.com/kBTqIYH.png)


**The mod works even in standalone mode; it does not require Cobblemon, only Fabric API — but I recommend playing it with Cobblemon/Cobbleverse.**


##  ⚖️ Legal Notice
 
 **This is a free fan-made mod created for entertainment purposes only.**
 
 **This project does not generate any profit**
 
 **It is not affiliated with or endorsed by The Pokémon Company**
 
 **All Pokémon-related images and assets belong entirely to their respective owners**
 
 **This mod simply uses existing Pokémon artwork to enhance the in-game experience in a creative and respectful way.**
